game.matchup: Minnesota Timberwolves at San Antonio Spurs

key_context: Minnesota stole Game 1 on the road despite San Antonio's Wembanyama defensive spike.
Market continued to price San Antonio as a heavy favorite into Game 2.
Model identified spread inflation on San Antonio alternate margin markets.
Randle rebound role remained sticky due to physical forward usage and matchup demands.

locked_positions.selection: No - San Antonio wins by over 10.5 points

locked_positions.edge_estimate: plus-money leak vs projected rebound distribution
